name: common_sense_f2134c2f-4d17-41f7-85d1-771d6f93c9e8
prompt: A medium shot captures a man speaking animatedly to the camera in a rustic kitchen setting. The camera moves randomly, focusing on the man who is gesturing with his hands raised, emphasizing points as he speaks. He leans forward, then straightens up, making head movements and continuing to gesture with his right hand while lowering his left hand to pick up a dark bottle with a blue label and cap. The bottle is held at face level towards the end of the clip. The man is wearing a white shirt with rolled-up sleeves, unfastened buttons near the neck, and a small black microphone clipped to his shirt. He has short brown hair, a trimmed brown beard, and a partially visible tattoo on his right hand along with a gold ring on his left ring finger.  The kitchen features wooden countertops with various jars, a silver sink, and a bowl of fruits. A green plant and a white cake stand with a brown object are visible nearby. A black kettle sits on the top right of the sink, alongside jars with brown cartoon designs and light strings. A red refrigerator in the background is adorned with stickers and dim lights, with bottles and a dark apron hanging from a plank. The walls are a mix of brown and white, with a space in between and a light bulb illuminating the scene. To the right, there are shelves filled with items, a brown frame, and strings of light hanging. A black coat rack with blue and white fabrics is present, along with a doorway on the far right. The top wall has a gray pattern with brown planks and purple objects attached.
